title: festuca duriuscula var. trachyphylla
intro: Festuca duriuscula var. trachyphylla, also known as the tough fescue, is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Festuca duriuscula var. trachyphylla include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Festuca duriuscula var. trachyphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
